response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a broad technical background, but his experience lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of C++ on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle, and capital markets/fixed income domain expertise. His profile is more suited to web/mobile development and open-source projects, though his problem-solving and testing acumen are notable strengths.
strengths: Diverse technical expertise across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, Java) and domains (web, mobile, embedded).
Strong focus on testability, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development).
Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and community contributions (workshops, talks).
concerns: Limited explicit C++ experience on Windows (only brief mention of C/C++ at National Instruments).
No evident fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience.
Primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and web technologies, not the required SQL Server/Oracle or messaging frameworks.
